case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JEKIAH SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JEKIAH
